questions.question: Explain Blockchain Developer Troubleshooting Part 8C and its primary use case in Blockchain Developer.
questions.answer: Blockchain Developer Troubleshooting Part 8C provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Blockchain Developer Troubleshooting Part 8C?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the Blockchain Developer runtime optimize Blockchain Developer Troubleshooting Part 8C under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
